model_patch.oh_filemanger_6.1/filemanager/common/src:
diff --git a/oh_filemanger_6.1/filemanager/common/src/main/cpp/trash/trash_utils.cpp b/oh_filemanger_6.1/filemanager/common/src/main/cpp/trash/trash_utils.cpp
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..38a8ac0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/oh_filemanger_6.1/filemanager/common/src/main/cpp/trash/trash_utils.cpp
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+#include <algorithm>
+#include <vector>
+#include <string>
+
+namespace trash {
+
+bool HasTrashItem(const std::vector<std::string>& items, const std::string& target) {
+    return std::any_of(items.begin(), items.end(), 
+                       [&target](const std::string& item) { return item == target; });
+}
+
+} // namespace trash
